voice_observations.caption_text:
If you believe every occasion deserves a completely different outfit, @aldeebajofficial is your destination. Visited their stunning Lahore outlet today and I am obsessed with the quality and colors!
Watch till the end to see my favorites, and visit them to get yours! ✨
#abayastyle #lahore #premiumabaya #modestwear #abaya
voice_observations.hook_text: If you believe every occasion deserves a completely different outfit,
voice_observations.voiceover_text: They say for every ukrainian there should be a different outfit and al debbach has taken care of it i just entered into al debbach ickbal town branch and i'm amazed the vibe here is pure luxury inqa interior ambience jitna classiya inke collection usse bi zaada elegant hai you can literally feel the premium craft in every stitch just look at this embroidery on the sleeves it's delicate, neat and high end i've picked out some of my favourite articles and let me show you how they look on me what i love about debbach aapko har event ke liye inke paas kuch na kuch zarur milega either you want to go on a breakfast, brunch or on a coffee date with your girlies sirf kaiyoli nahi aapko festive wear bhi milega and their festive collection is on another level and their prices are very reasonable i've secured my favourites and i'm obsessed if you want to elevate your wardrobe you know where to go
